label: Transparent betta fish motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout, chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a betta fins motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A single betta fish with dramatic flowing fins, crimson body and fin edges, royal-blue depth, teal iridescent highlights, translucent fin membranes, compact head, and elegant aquarium-fish posture. It must clearly read as a betta fish, not koi, goldfish, guppy, or tropical reef fish.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include full flowing fins, body, and tail without cropping. Clean studio lighting that preserves natural fish texture and fin translucency.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, lighting variation, or vignette. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no aquarium tank scene, no plants, no bubbles, no multiple fish, no koi markings, no props, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection, no text, no watermark.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Betta Fish light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Betta Fish", derived from the visible betta fins cutout in this conversation. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible product UI theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, 4K-class look, clean professional UI design-system presentation, readable at gallery preview size.
Required visible sections: Morphous Betta Fish, Betta Fins, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract the palette and interaction language from crimson fins, royal-blue body depth, teal iridescence, aqua flashes, glass-water surfaces, translucent fin membranes, and midnight tank shadows. The board must read as betta fish fins, not koi, goldfish, coral reef, or generic tropical fish.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; include short readable labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI, 見出し, 本文. Keep all text large and legible around saturated fin colors.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing scale, radius scale, border, shadow, texture samples, simple UI icons.
Style: fluid creator system, precise 8px grid, 8px card radius, light tank-pearl background, glass-water surfaces, betta-crimson primary actions, royal-blue active panels, fin-teal focus rings, aqua status states, translucent fin-ripple texture, vivid command/search surface, soft layered shadows.
Color palette: crimson, teal, royal blue, aqua flash, midnight tank, glass water, tank pearl, deep ink; use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals.
Constraints: no koi pattern, no goldfish, no coral reef theme, no generic purple gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no beige-only palette, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Betta Fish", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Betta Fish dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Betta Fish". It must feel like the visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible betta fins cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, 4K-class look, clean professional UI design-system presentation, readable at gallery preview size.
Required visible sections: Morphous Betta Fish, Betta Fins, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve the same betta system language as the visible light board: midnight tank panels, royal-blue depth, crimson actions, teal focus, aqua status, translucent fin textures, fluid navigation, and precise shadcn/tweakcn grid.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; include short readable labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI, 見出し, 本文. Keep all text large and legible on dark saturated surfaces.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing scale, radius scale, border, shadow, texture samples, simple UI icons.
Visual details: dark royal panels, midnight tank background, pale glass text, crimson active states, teal focus rings, aqua chart highlights, fin-ripple overlays, soft luminous shadows, crisp 8px cards, subtle aquatic glass texture.
Color palette: deep ink, midnight tank, royal blue, betta crimson, fin teal, aqua flash, glass water, pearl text; use only motif-derived colors plus dark near-neutrals.
Constraints: no koi, no goldfish, no neon coral reef overload, no pure-black-only flat background, no generic purple gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Betta Fish", no illegible tiny paragraphs.
